Do nowego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach wciąż szukam PANÓW:

- Mechanik (27) – typ drobnego kryminalisty. 2 sceny 
Data: 25.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

- Strażnik, Lech Wasiecki (47) – strażnik więzienny, w cywilu. Prosty człowiek. 2 sceny 
Data: 24.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

- Włamywacz (43) – profesjonalny złodziej, wygląd kryminalisty. 3 sceny
Data: 25.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto

- Grzesiak (51) – zresocjalizowany włamywacz. 1 scena 
Data: 26.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto

- Gangus 2, Jacek Romańczyk (30) – napakowany zbir 
  Data: 24.06 i 25.06
Stawka: 600 zł netto 

- Gangus 1, Michał Bocian (40) – kryminalista, sprawny fizycznie Data: 24.06
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
Casting Call
Chapter Three Productions are casting SHIPS, a new play premiering in Leith at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe.

We are particularly keen to hear from actors from Black,South Asian, mixed-race, and other underrepresented backgrounds for a major role central to the production.

CONNOR: Merchant seaman, mid 30s–mid 40s. Leither. A complex, emotionally demanding role exploring trauma, loneliness, addiction, identity, and the struggle to reconnect with home and self. Open auditions will be held in Edinburgh in May 2026. 

If interested, please send a CV and headshot to: shipsleith@yahoo.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of boat and text

🎬 **1 Day Adult Intro to the American Accent — Brisbane**
*An intensive with Sandra Bell*

Learn from one of Australia's most experienced dialect coaches — and walk away with showreel footage.

📅 **Saturday 27 June 2026**
🕙 **10am – 4:30pm**
📍 **Queensland Headshots, 1192 Stanley St East, Coorparoo QLD**
💵 **$260 standard | $240 returning students** (GST inc.)

**What's included:**
* Hands-on American accent coaching: placement, rhythm and the sounds that give it away
* Targeted exercises that build the accent into your body, not just your ear
* Performance work with scenes on their feet, under real pressure
* A filmed US accent scene captured on the day
* A green screen newsreader scene, edited and delivered
* Showreel-ready footage you can submit straight away

**About Sandra Bell:**
32 years as one of Australia's most sought-after American accent dialect coaches. 1,000+ students. National workshops. 18 years teaching 3rd year drama students at QUT. 20+ years with TAFTA.

⚠️ **Only 12 places. Minimum 8 for the day to run.**

👉 Book at queenslandheadshots.com/sandrabell
📧 [info@queenslandheadshots.com](mailto:info@queenslandheadshots.com) | 📞 0403 871 686

items.text:
PAID SPOKESPERSON CASTING – VANCOUVER

We're casting an on-camera spokesperson for a series of professional educational videos in the financial services industry.

We're looking for someone who feels natural, relatable, trustworthy, and authentic on camera. The ideal candidate should have a warm presence and be comfortable delivering scripted content in a conversational, approachable way.

Project Details

Presenter / spokesperson role

Speaking role

4-hour shoot

Compensation: $500

Filming in the Vancouver area

Videos will be used across website, marketing, sales, onboarding, and educational materials

What We're Looking For

Male or female

Approximately 35–55 years old

Strong communication skills

Comfortable speaking directly to camera

Natural, everyday appearance preferred over a traditional commercial/model look

Previous on-camera experience is an asset but not required

To Apply

Please send:

Recent headshot or photos

A short self-tape (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself and delivering a few lines to camera

Send submissions to: colin@your-story.agency

Due to the volume of submissions, we will only be able to contact selected applicants. We sincerely appreciate everyone's interest and keep submissions on file for future opportunities.

topComments.text: There was no mention of a usage fee/buyout/duration. Seeing as it would be used for marketing as well, has a buyout been discussed?

Hi Colin
What is the deadline to submit the audition tape?

items.text:
VANCOUVER CASTING CALL: COURTING YOU

Project Type: BookTok/Teaser Trailer

**Compensation: Demo reel material (plus be a part of something fun!)**

**Ideal for actors looking to build romantic lead footage and on-screen chemistry scenes for their demo reel.**

Union Status: **Non-union performers only, please.**

Director/Casting Director: Brianne Hogan

Contact Information: brianne.hogan@gmail.com

Audition Location: Self-tape

Submission Deadline: **June 21, 2026**

Shooting Date: **July 11, 2026**

Shooting Location: Vancouver (TBD)

Shoot Length: Approximately 2–3 hours maximum. 

**SYNOPSIS**

Based on my upcoming e-book, Courting You, this contemporary romantic comedy follows Riley, a 40-year-old woman rebuilding her life after the end of a long-term relationship. Looking for a fresh start, she joins a local tennis club and unexpectedly falls for Hunter, the club's charming 23-year-old tennis instructor. What begins as an unexpected attraction quickly turns into something deeper as both struggle with the realities of their age gap, outside expectations, and the question of whether their connection is worth the risk.

**IMPORTANT NOTE**

Courting You is an age-gap romance between a woman in her 40s and a man in his 20s. Performers should be comfortable portraying romantic attraction, chemistry, and flirtation within this dynamic.

**SCENE BEING FILMED**

The trailer focuses on Riley and Hunter's first meeting at a tennis club. After Hunter accidentally hits Riley with a tennis ball, he rushes over to check on her. The attraction is immediate—until they realize he's the instructor and she's the student.

Tone: Romantic, playful, flirty, contemporary rom-com with strong chemistry and a touch of tension.

**CHARACTER BREAKDOWN**

RILEY (Lead) | Female | 38–45

Riley is a travel writer—independent, adventurous, and globally savvy. Having spent much of her life charting her own course, she's never followed the traditional path expected of women her age. Recently out of a long-term relationship, she's at a crossroads, questioning who she is and what she wants next.

Witty, quirky, and effortlessly relatable, Riley uses humour to navigate uncertainty. When she meets Hunter, what begins as an unexpected attraction quickly becomes something more, forcing her to reconsider the future she thought she wanted.

Personality: Intelligent, warm, self-aware, dry sense of humour, emotionally guarded but hopeful.

HUNTER (Lead) | Male | 22–27

Hunter is a former elite junior tennis player who walked away from his professional ambitions to pursue a law degree. Freshly graduated, he's caught between the life he's always been told he should want and the freedom he's beginning to crave.

Responsible, level-headed, and naturally caring, Hunter has spent most of his life meeting expectations—particularly those of his parents. Beneath his calm exterior is someone eager to experience adventure, take risks, and discover who he is outside of everyone else's plans for him.

Meeting Riley awakens a side of himself he's never fully explored.

Personality: Confident but grounded, compassionate, dependable, mature beyond his years, quietly charismatic.

Requirements: Must be comfortable and believable playing an experienced tennis player. Strong tennis skills preferred. Height 6'0"+. Must be comfortable appearing shirtless for portions of the shoot.

CHEMISTRY BETWEEN LEADS

Riley and Hunter share an immediate, undeniable connection. Their dynamic is playful, flirtatious, and emotionally authentic, with strong romantic tension.

Casting Note: Chemistry between leads is the most important element of this project. Performers should be able to convey attraction, warmth, humour, and emotional depth with minimal dialogue.

**TO SUBMIT**
** Please send the following to: brianne.hogan@gmail.com**

**• Headshot**
** • Resume (if available)**
** • Recent photo(s)**
** • Brief note outlining any tennis experience**
** • Demo reel (optional)**
** • Optional: a short introduction telling us why you're interested in the role**

**Subject Line: *****Courting You – [Riley / Hunter]***

items.summary:
VANCOUVER CASTING CALL: COURTING YOU

Project Type: BookTok/Teaser Trailer

**Compensation: Demo reel material (plus be a part of something fun!)**

**Ideal for actors looking to build romantic lead footage and on-screen chemistry scenes for their demo reel.**

Union Status: **Non-union performers only, please.**

Director/Casting Director: Brianne Hogan

Contact Information: brianne.hogan@gmail.com

Audition Location: Self-tape

Submission Deadline: **June 21, 2026**

Shooting Date: **July 11, 2026**

Shooting Location: Vancouver (TBD)

Shoot Length: Approximately 2–3 hours maximum. 

**SYNOPSIS**

Based on my upcoming e-book, Courting You, this contemporary romantic comedy follows Riley, a 40-year-old woman rebuilding her life after the end of a long-term relationship. Looking for a fresh start, she joins a local tennis club and unexpectedly falls for Hunter, the club's charming 23-year-old tennis instructor. What begins as an unexpected attraction quickly turns into something deeper as both struggle with the realities of their age gap, outside expectations, and the question of whether their connection is worth the risk.

**IMPORTANT NOTE**

Courting You is an age-gap romance between a woman in her 40s and a man in his 20s. Performers should be comfortable portraying romantic attraction, chemistry, and flirtation within this dynamic.

**SCENE BEING FILMED**

The trailer focuses on Riley and Hunter's first meeting at a tennis club. After Hunter accidentally hits Riley with a tennis ball, he rushes over to check on her. The attraction is immediate—until they realize he's the instructor and she's the student.

Tone: Romantic, playful, flirty, contemporary rom-com with strong chemistry and a touch of tension.

**CHARACTER BREAKDOWN**

RILEY (Lead) | Female | 38–45

Riley is a travel writer—independent, adventurous, and globally savvy. Having spent much of her life charting her own course, she's never followed the traditional path expected of women her age. Recently out of a long-term relationship, she's at a crossroads, questioning who she is and what she wants next.

Personality: Confident but grounded, compassionate, dependable, mature beyond his years, quietly charismatic.

Requirements: Must be comfortable and believable playing an experienced tennis player. Strong tennis skills preferred. Height 6'0"+. Must be comfortable appearing shirtless for portions of the shoot.

CHEMISTRY BETWEEN LEADS

Riley and Hunter share an immediate, undeniable connection. Their dynamic is playful, flirtatious, and emotionally authentic, with strong romantic tension.

Casting Note: Chemistry between leads is the most important element of this project. Performers should be able to convey attraction, warmth, humour, and emotional depth with minimal dialogue.

items.text:
KentKasper.net 

The Headline: The 24/7 Celebrity Mentor (Your Secret Weapon in a Town That Eats Hopes for Breakfast)

Forget everything you think you know about "acting coaches."

In an industry where 90% of actors quit within a few years—swallowed by the noise, the rejection, and the chaos—you need more than just a teacher. You need a lifeline. You need a strategist, a therapist, a hype-man, and a legal mind who knows exactly where the Hollywood minefields are buried.

You need Kent Kasper.

Having Kent on your team isn't just hiring a coach. It’s like having a 24/7 concierge for your career. It’s having someone in your corner who ensures that while the other 90% are tapping out, you’re stepping up.

---

What is Kent? He’s the "Swiss Army Knife" of Show Business.

· Part Mentor: Who extracts the gold from your gut and puts it on the screen.
· Part Life Coach: Who keeps you sane when the silence is deafening.
· Part Teacher: Who hands you the tools.
· Part Guide: Who walks you through the dark.
· A splash of Muse: To spark the fire.
· A dash of Magic: Because let's face it, you need it in Tinseltown.

Kent Kasper is the Master Power Coach who proves that "luck" is just a fancy word for what happens when opportunity meets preparation. And no one—and I mean no one—prepares you like Kent.

---

The Résumé of a Warrior (And Why It Matters to You)

Kent isn’t a theorist. He’s a SAG-AFTRA working actor with 40+ years of blood, sweat, and applause. He has navigated the very trenches you’re trying to cross.

· The Laughs: A national headlining comedian for over a decade. (HBO, Showtime, Netflix, Comedy Central—yeah, those stages).
· The Credits: Co-starred in over 25 TV shows (Mad Men, Monk, Rules of Engagement) and 20 films (Apollo 13, Space Jam).
· The Face: Starred in over 200 commercials. (If you’ve watched TV in the last 20 years, you’ve seen him).
.  Veteran of over a dozen vertical micro dramas.
· The Icon: For 18 years, he was the go-to Dr. Phil lookalike—doubling for him in commercials, films, and private events.
· The Legal Eagle: He holds a master degree and a law degree from Thurgood Marshall School of Law and served as a NYC Assistant District Attorney. (He knows how to read contracts so you don't have to cry later).
. Author of 4 acting books on Amazon 
. Corporate Trainer -Consultant - Keynote speaker to top Fortune 500 companies..

His Philosophy: "Don't Fight Your Type, Master It!"

---

The Kent Kasper Difference: The "Concierge" Treatment

Most coaches give you a one-hour slot and send you on your way. Kent gives you systems.

His laser-focused, battle-tested methodology covers 100+ essential areas of the biz that most actors don’t even know exist. We’re talking:

· Audition Preparation: Turning your nerves into nuclear weapons. Booking the room!

· The Trinity (Agent/Manager/CD Blitzes): Getting you in the rooms that matter
.
· Branding, Marketing & Packaging: Turning you from a "hopeful" into a product Hollywood wants to buy.

· Demo Tape Preparation: Because your reel is your resume.

.Vertical micro drama prep .

.Photo shoot branding & packaging 

Working with Kent increases your opportunities by 1000%. And when those opportunities come? He prepares you like a heavyweight boxer stepping into the ring with Iron Mike Tyson. You won't just survive; you'll dominate.

---

Who Has Kent Coached?

Everyone. Literally.

From diapers to Depends..

He’s worked with families, couples,toddlers tweens ,teens ,seniors and friends. He’s helped firefighters, doctors, lawyers, bus drivers, teachers, veterans, chefs, and salesmen drop their day-job identities and pick up their acting dreams.

Whether you’re in your living room or on the other side of the globe, Kent is there. Sessions are available in-person, or via FaceTime, Zoom, Instagram, and Facebook Messenger.

---

The Bottom Line (Irresistible Edition)

You can try to navigate the Hollywood minefield alone. You can hope for a lucky break. You can be one of the 90% who bows out.

Or, you can have a 24/7 ally.

You can have a man who has been a lawyer, corporate trainer , a professional union actor , published author , a comedian, a TV star, a Dr. Phil celebrity look alike and a mentor to thousands. You can have someone who answers the call when you're panicking before an audition, who strategizes when you're lost, and who celebrates when you win.

There is no other coach on this planet with the background, the care, and the relentless drive of Kent Kasper.

This is your invitation. Let’s get to work…

The last few have sold out. So be quick! 🏃‍♀️🏃💨

Train for Authenticity, Perform with Power. 🎭🎬

Unleash your authentic self and discover new emotional depths in your performances. The Meisner technique transforms more than just your acting—it transforms you.

Class is limited to 12 students.

Meisner Technique - Intro & Repetition Skills
Book Now @ www.bodymindvoice.co.uk/meisner-intro
 Consent-informed connection and sustainable emotional exploration - unlock your true potential!

* Dates: Wednesdays, 4 pm – 7 pm
* Duration: 17 June - 22nd July
* Location: Marylebone, London
* Class Size: Limited to 12 places for personal attention

🎟️ What’s Included: ✅ Six guided in-person sessions ✅ 1 personalised feedback session ✅ 1 FREE drop-in Actor Training Session for continued practice 🎉

Whether you’re a beginner or an experienced actor looking to refresh your skills, this course will help you tap into deeper dynamics and develop truthful behaviour in your work.

💰 Fees:
* £225 for 20+ hours of training
* £205 each if you bring a friend (save £20 each!) 💥

The Meisner Technique has consistently proven to build truthful, dynamic acting—the glue that ties all disciplines together! 💡 Join us in a fun, supportive environment that fosters genuine connection and growth. 🌱

BOOK NOW: www.bodymindvoice.co.uk/meisner-intro
Or email - mail@lawrencecarmichael.com

⚡ Limited to just 12 places—secure your spot today!

items.text:
At Cherry Pips Acting, we specialise in TV & screen technique! 🎬

As well as self tape technique we also explore blocking movement for camera and shot types, for example a two shot or a tracking shot 🎥

We cultivate a space where young actors can explore, develop understanding and build confidence on camera! 💫

Want to know more about our classes & courses in Manchester or online?

📧 Send us an email today!

classes@mcaa.co.uk

items.summary:
At Cherry Pips Acting, we specialise in TV & screen technique! 🎬

As well as self tape technique we also explore blocking movement for camera and shot types, for example a two shot or a tracking shot 🎥

We cultivate a space where young actors can explore, develop understanding and build confidence on camera! 💫

Want to know more about our classes & courses in Manchester or online?

📧 Send us an email today!

classes@mcaa.co.uk

items.text: Magic Show WOW

sharedPost.text:
✨ Where mystery comes to life and the impossible becomes reality.

Every illusion tells a story, every movement creates wonder, and every moment leaves the audience believing in magic.

A breathtaking performance filled with elegance, emotion, and unforgettable surprises.

🕊️ Magic is not just something you see... it's something you feel.

#MagicShowWOW #BubbleShowWOW #MagicPerformance #Illusionist #StageMagic #MagicShow #LiveEntertainment #Magician #DoveMagic #MagicAct #CircusMagic #TheArtOfIllusion #BelieveInMagic #Wonder #FantasyShow #MagicMoments #ShowTime #SpectacularShow #LivePerformance #WOWExperience

sharedPost.text:
Do serialu, szukamy dublera aktora. 

Mężczyzna - wiek - 45 - 65 lat 

Włosy blond, lekko kręcone, postawny mężczyzna z lekka nadwagą. 

Link do zgłoszenia: 
https://casting-app.pl/apply/12f44afaef994a0c9700b1439304554d

items.text:
NOWY PROGRAM KULINARNY NIE CZEKAJ, ZGŁOŚ SIĘ JUŻ DZIŚ!
Lubisz gotować? 

Zgłoś się do nowego programu kulinarnego! 

Szukamy osób solo oraz duetów – rodzin, par, rodzeństw i przyjaciół. 

Jeśli gotowanie sprawia Ci przyjemność, czekamy właśnie na Ciebie. 

Na uczestników czekają nagrody! 

Napisz do mnie w wiadomości prywatnej, a ja opowiem o szczegółach. 

Zuza

items.text:
Dzień dobry!
Nazywam się Katarzyna Maria Zawadzka. Jestem aktorką oraz trenerką aktorstwa i wystąpień publicznych. 🎭

Oferuję wsparcie dzieciom i młodzieży w przygotowaniu do:

✨ castingów filmowych i reklamowych,✨ konkursów aktorskich,✨ wystąpień publicznych wymagających świadomej autoprezentacji.

Pomagam również w przygotowaniu profesjonalnych wizytówek aktorskich zgodnych z aktualnymi standardami branżowymi oraz w nagrywaniu scen castingowych. Prowadzę także regularne lekcje aktorstwa zarówno online, jak i stacjonarnie. 🎬

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 W swojej pracy wspieram również rodziców i opiekunów, zwłaszcza tych, którzy nie są związani z branżą filmową lub teatralną. Pomagam świadomie planować rozwój kariery młodych aktorek i aktorów, podpowiadam, jak odnaleźć się podczas castingów, na jakiej podstawie podejmować trafne decyzje dotyczące współpracy z agencjami i produkcjami oraz jak rozpoznawać potencjalne zagrożenia związane z działalnością w branży.

🤸‍♀️ Od niemal roku z powodzeniem współpracuję także z dziewczęcą grupą wyczynowej gimnastyki powietrznej. Wspieram zawodniczki w budowaniu postaci scenicznej do choreografii, rozwijaniu ekspresji, emocjonalności, charyzmy oraz świadomej interakcji z publicznością i jury.

🏆 Brałam również udział jako trenerka dziecięcych aktorów przy realizacji wielokrotnie nagradzanego na festiwalach filmu krótkometrażowego „Iron Cloud” w reżyserii Nikodema Wojciechowskiego.

📩 Zapraszam do kontaktu!Chętnie odpowiem na pytania i opowiem o możliwościach współpracy dostosowanych do indywidualnych potrzeb dziecka, młodzieży lub grupy.

📧 E-mail: kmzawadzkatrener@gmail.com

💬 Lub wiadomość prywatna

☎️ Lub tel. 732 561 386

Poprzez scenki, ruch, zabawę mini musical uczestnicy uczą się sie pracy emocjami, wyrazu scenicznego budowania pewności siebie. 15+ lat pracy dziećmi mini musical wystąpienia publiczne wyraz sceniczny dla dzieci 6-12lat 6-12 lat kameralne grupy Scena zaczyna się od odwagi!'

items.text:
WARSZAWA// CASTING 

Poszukujemy aktorów dubbingowych do niezależnej animacji, z wyjątkowym przesłaniem. 

Realizacja: jeden dzień pomiędzy 1 - 15 lipca 2026 r. w Warszawie. 

Poszukujemy głosów do ról:
* Chłopiec - 7-11 lat 
* Dziewczynka - 8 - 11 lat 
* Chłopiec - 8 - 12 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 25- 45 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 28-45 lat
* Mężczyzna - 40-55 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyźni - 27-45 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyzna - 35- 50 lat (z dobrym akcentem amerykańskim!)

Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: 
* portfolio
* próbkę głosu 
* dostępność w lipcu (prosimy o wypisanie konkretnych dni) 

Zgłoszenia: 

Na maila: [aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com](mailto:aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com)

Tytuł: Animacja dubbing casting + nazwa roli (np. Mężczyzna 35-50 lat)

BARDZO proszę o przestrzeganie tytułowania maili. 

Zlecenie: płatne. 

Szczegóły projektu wyślemy wybranym osobom :)

Link do zgloszenia - Kobiety

📍 Termin zdjęć: 23 czerwca 
📍 Miejsce: Grójec, wyjazd z Warszawy transportem produkcyjnym o 6:00

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '23.06 Statyści Grójec (transport z Warszawy)'

topComments.text: 🟡 Sprawdzanie kierowców autobusów obejmuje weryfikację ich uprawnień, stanu zdrowia i trzeźwości. Inspekcje prowadzą Policja oraz Inspekcja Transportu Drogowego. W przypadku podróży autokarem, legalność pojazdu sprawdzisz online, a w razie nagłych wątpliwości możesz poprosić służby o doraźne badanie.Procedura weryfikacji kierowców i autokarów opiera się na kilku konkretnych krokach:1. Zgłoszenie kontroli autokaru (np. przed wycieczką)Możesz poprosić lokalną jednostkę policji o zbadanie stanu technicznego pojazdu i trzeźwości kierowcy przed wyruszeniem w trasę:Warszawa: Oficjalne wnioski (zwłaszcza dla grup zorganizowanych) można składać poprzez stronę Wydziału Ruchu Drogowego KSP.Ogólnokrajowe punkty: W całym kraju wyznaczono stałe miejsca kontroli, których listę znajdziesz w wykazie na stronach Policji.2. Sprawdzenie pojazdu onlineZanim dotrze do Ciebie autokar, możesz zweryfikować jego podstawowe dane (ważność badań technicznych, ubezpieczenie) w państwowej usłudze Sprawdź autobus. Wystarczy wpisać numer rejestracyjny na stronie rządowej Gov.pl.3. Uprawnienia i badania kierowcówKierowcy zawodowi muszą spełniać restrykcyjne normy:Prawo jazdy: Wymagane jest posiadanie prawa jazdy kategorii D.Badania lekarskie i psychologiczne: Kierowcy do 60. roku życia muszą przechodzić badania co 5 lat, a po ukończeniu 60 lat – co 2 lub 3 lata.4. Co weryfikują służby podczas kontroli?Gdy kontrola jest realizowana na drodze lub w punktach stacjonarnych, funkcjonariusze dokładnie sprawdzają:Trzeźwość i stan psychofizyczny kierowcy.Czas pracy kierowcy (na podstawie tachografu), aby wyeliminować przemęczenie.Uprawnienia i kwalifikacje.5. Jak zgłosić zastrzeżenia do kierowcy?Jeżeli jesteś pasażerem i zauważysz nieprawidłowości, możesz złożyć oficjalną skargę. W Warszawie można to zrobić za pośrednictwem platformy Warszawa 19115 lub w Punktach Obsługi Pasażerów ZTM. W przypadku rażącego łamania prawa (podejrzenie jazdy pod wpływem alkoholu), należy niezwłocznie dzwonić pod numer alarmowy 112.

items.text:
NOWA STAŁA POSTAĆ W SERIALU „GLINIARZE” !!!

Do serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję aktora do nowej stałej roli:

„Młody” (18 lat) - dres i cwaniaczek, imponuje mu gangsterskie środowisko. Lekko przypakowany, krótko ostrzyżony, cwany uśmiech, zaczepny wzrok. Bezczelny, lubi iść po bandzie.

Postać pojawi się w kilku odcinkach.
 
Chętnych i dyspozycyjnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

Odezwę się tylko do wybranych osób.

items.text:
**UKRYTA PRAWDA  - WARSZAWA - CZERWIEC**

1. **JACEK (38) **- wrażliwy, emocjonalny, mściwy mężczyzna. Podejmuje terapię u Tomasza tylko z chęci zemsty: obwinia terapeutę za to, że żona od niego odeszła i zabrała dziecko. 15 i 17.06 Stawka 1200 zł 
2. **PACJENT 17.06**, kilka zdań, 250 zł płatne po planie
3. **KOMISARZ 19.06**, kilka zdań, 250 zł płatne po planie

📩 Mailowo proszę przesłać informacje: imię i nazwisko, wiek, wzrost, numer telefonu oraz materiały: wideo wizytówkę, aktualne zdjęcia i informacje o doświadczeniu. 

Zgłoszenia kierujemy na: [patrycja.lewandowska@constantin-entertainment.pl](mailto:patrycja.lewandowska@constantin-entertainment.pl) w tytule wpisując nazwę roli.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – ACTION FEATURE FILM (UK SHOOT) 

Dear all, back again with a brand-new project. Kindly ensure this is not mixed up with my previous two projects which are still ongoing. 

We are now casting for an action film shooting in the UK from August/September (exact dates TBC). 

Theatrical worldwide release. 
Shoot Location: UK (exact location TBC). 
Day Rate: £300. 
Expenses covered. 
Shoot dates for each character will be confirmed soon. 

It is extremely important that you mention the CHARACTER NAME in the subject line of your email as I am working on multiple projects and this helps keep things organised. 

Please send a couple of photographs or a Spotlight link to farhan.baqi@mcccuk.co.uk as soon as possible. 

For all Romanian characters, actors must be Romanian or appear Romanian and be able to perform a Romanian accent. 

1 - Characters: MI-17 Captain – Male, Indian, Age 35–40. 

MI-17 Co-Pilot – Indian, Male, Age 35–40. 

2- Artur Kirstov – Russian, Male, Age 40–45 (Reference: Gary Oldman in Air Force One). 

3 - Borris – Russian, Male, Age 35–40. Tattoos piercing , muscular built would be great

4 - Hunter 1 – Male, Romanian, Early 30s. reference Stuntman or someone with Fighting experience. Tattoos piercing , muscular built would be  great. 

5 - Hunter 2 – Male, Romanian, Early 30s. reference Stuntman or someone with Fighting experience. Tattoos piercing , muscular built would be great

6 - Air Force Officer ATC – Indian, Male Age 30–35. 

Romanian mercenary – Romanian, younger than Boris and Artur 25 to 30. Tattoos piercing , muscular built would be great

Look forward to hearing as always. I have cast some great roles from this group so Thank you once again 🙂

Regards
FB
MCCC (London)

items.title: (no title)

items.text:
CASTING CALL - The Brother, The wife, and The End of a Life
"Brody had his suspicions. His brother and his wife together? could it be... Or at least that is what he thought until his brother was found dead. Stabbed they said. The killer no where is sight. So why is it his wife seems so nervous..."

Come star in our 3 part Micro Drama student film. Looking for 3 actors, two men aged between 25 and 35, and a woman of the same age.

shooting 21st May & 28th May (10am-5pm) - High Wycombe (subject to change)

Travel and food will be paid for.

If you are interested, email us with a headshot of yourself and any past experience that may be relevant!

elliottfoster17@outlook.com (Elliott), carterelijah@gmail.com  (Elijah), or 22308662@bnu.ac.uk (Finn).

items.text:
Hi, my name is Isabelle, 

I am a third-year student at the University of Winchester studying film production. My crew and I are looking for actors to play our two main characters and side characters for my short film, which I am directing, called Dandelion. 

Auditions will take place at the University of Winchester in late June to early July (if dates change, we will notify you.) Filming will commence from the 26th of October to the 30th of October 2026. 

Please email i.bolton.24@unimail.winchester.ac.uk or my producer at e.seiller-batten.23@unimail.winchester.ac.uk for further information. 

Please review the individual casting call posters for information on each character:

attachments.ocrText: May be a doodle of text that says ''DANDELION' Casting calls... Trapped in a cleaning closet, during a raging zombie horde, two teenagers are forced into uneasy silence- Until their whispered confessions reveal that the horrors outside aren't the only ones they are running from. Pleasereview the individual character casting calls to apply. interested please either email e.seiller- batten.23@unimai.winchester.ac.uk batten. or i.bolton.24@eunimail.winchester.c.uk'

May be a graphic of text that says 'DANDELION June Brooks We are looking for an actress to portray 'June Brooks', our main character! !! REQUIREMENTS: ·FEMALE. •BRUNETTE. •19-23. •5'6-5'8. •5'6- ·MUST BE OKAY WITH FAKE BLOOD, PROSTHETICS. (ALLERGY TESTING WILL BE PROVIDED.) •MUST BE OKAY WITH LGBTO THEMES. June is a 19-year-old girl with brunette hair, tanned complexion and dark eyes. She is reserved and judgmental. PLEASE EMAIL: ILisileletererimain FOR FURTHER INFORMATION.'

May be an image of text that says 'DANDELION Mary Knox We are looking for an actress to portray 'Mary Knox', our main character!! !! REQUIREMENTS: •FEMALE. •BLONDE. ·19-21. ·5'3 5'5. ·MUST BE OKAY WITH FAKE BLOOD, PROSTHETICS. (ALLERGY TESTING WILL BE PROVIDED.) ·MUST BE OKAY WITH LGBTQ THEMES. Mary is an 18-year-old female with blonde hair, fair complexion, and bright eyes. She is bubbly, energetic and humorous. PLEASE EMAIL: :esilleraete.@.ueuimalinin FOR FURTHER INFORMATION.'

May be a doodle of text that says 'DANDELION Darren Brooks We are looking for an actor to portray 'Darren Brooks', a side character! !! REQUIREMENTS: ·MALE. •BRUNETTE. BUZZ CUT. •20-25. ·5'10-6'Ό, ·MUST BE OKAY WITH LGBTQ THEMES. •OKAY WITH SMOKING. Darren is the older brother of June. He has a buzzcut, dark eyes and olive/fair complexion. He is cocky, sarcastic and protective. PLEASE EMAIL: esellelatenamuialint FOR FURTHER INFORMATION.'

May be a graphic of text that says 'DANDELIONA Sadie Banks We are looking for an actor to portray 'Sadie Banks, character! side REQUIREMENTS: •FEMALE. ·BLONDE. ·19-20. 5'6 to 5'9 ·MUST BE OKAY WITH LGBTQ THEMES. Sadie is the school bully to June. She has long blonde hair, a fair complexion and blue eyes. She is bitchy, entitled and mean. PLEASE EMAIL: esilbtetene@bermaintn batten. FOR FURTHER INFORMATION.'

items.text:
**Looking for an iPhone Camera Operator**

Need someone for a one day shoot this Saturday (4 hours).

You'll be filming TikTok style content using:
* iPhone 17 Pro
* DJI wireless microphones
* Portable LED light

Equipment is provided. Just need an operator who knows how to move quickly, capture clean social content, and work comfortably with an iPhone setup.

Paid gig.

If interested, DM:
* Your experience shooting social content
* A few examples of your work

Location: Pasadena, CA
Date: Saturday
Duration: 4 hours
items.title: RECAP

topComments.text: Just DM’d you. I recently shot a social media video that got over 50 Million total combined views

You can also see more at:

PAID Casting Notice!

Production Type: Feature Film

Shoot Dates: Late Aug - Sep 2026

Shoot Location: Los Angeles, CA

Compensation: $200 / Day, 5 days

***How to Submit***

Please ONLY submit via Casting Callback using the following link.

https://castingcallback.com/job/24134/feature-film-sleeping-with-sedona

It is FREE to register and FREE to submit

Any issues, please email: contact@castingcallback.com

✅ Please DO share with any suitable actors or actor groups

❌ Please DON'T respond "Interested" to this post

Hi! I'm casting for a PAID GIG in Texas, Chicago Area, or Greater Ohio. 

Seeking *REAL* ALLSTATE customers.

PAID • Non Union • Commercial

Dates: 1 shoot day June 23-27 OR Week of July 6, 2026

Must be local in Texas, Chicago Area, or Greater Ohio. 

Are you an Allstate customer who can speak about one of the below experiences?

- Switched from another provider for Home or Auto insurance and saved money

- Purchased Allstate Home Insurance directly through Allstate

- Purchased Allstate Rental Insurance

- Purchased and Experienced Using Allstate Roadside Assistance

- Purchased Allstate Auto Insurance and Roadside Assistance as a bundle

If you are one of the above, apply by filling out the form here: https://rb.gy/miv3i8

items.text:
**LAPLANDUK CASTING CALL - FATHER CHRISTMAS**  

LaplandUK are seeking performers to bring to life the pivotal role of Father Christmas.  

A warm, charismatic, and deeply believable embodiment of the beloved festive figure at the heart of the LaplandUK experience. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle.   

**ROLE DETAILS ** 
Father Christmas Pay: £20.50 per hour (training & live show)  
£50 daily subsidy per working day  
Rehearsal days approx. 8 hours 

**AUDITION DATES ** 
London (Camberley Theatre) 
Monday 8th – Friday 12th June  

Manchester (Capesthorne Hall) 
Monday 15th – Friday 19th June 

Audition slots are limited and filling quickly, therefore, to be considered, please complete either the London or Manchester application form below and we’ll send full audition details and next steps. 

**LONDON** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-an…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Ascot-2026/125) 

**MANCHESTER** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Gr…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Manchester-2026/126) 

If you have any questions, please contact [eventhr@lapland.group](mailto:eventhr@lapland.group)

items.text:
PROFIT SHARE
# **Audition notice: Underneath the Lintel**

Show dates: 20-24 October 2026

Show venue: Nottingham Arts Theatre (studio)

Audition date: 11 July 2026, 1-4 pm (you will not need to be present for the full time and will be assigned a timeslot).

Audition venue: Lace Market Theatre, Nottingham

Karuna Productions invites auditionees for *Underneath the Lintel,* a one-woman show about obsession, loneliness and the search for belonging. When a middle-aged librarian uncovers evidence that a mythical figure dating back to mediaeval times may actually exist, she embarks on an improbable, absurd quest. It will take her across the world and face to face with life’s biggest questions – and finally to a small theatre in Nottingham to share her story…
# Parts

**The Librarian **(F, 40s-50s). Dutch (accent negotiable. Support will be available as needed on pronunciation of a few Dutch words – the director is a Dutch speaker). Eccentric, single-minded, a loner, somewhat scatty. She may initially appear ordinary, even forgettable, but a great deal lurks beneath. Requires a skilled actor with excellent comic instincts, who can command an audience’s attention while convincing as someone with limited social skills and an acute interest in minutiae.

# **About the production**

The run time of the show is about 1 hour. Rehearsals will take place in Nottingham, scheduled according to the availability of actor and director. This is a profit-share production.

# **About the company**

Karuna Productions is a new theatre company based in Nottingham.

**Director: **Chris Sims. Chris is a Nottingham-based director and graduate of the Bristol Old Vic Theatre School. Examples of his work can be found at [www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk](https://www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk/).

**Producer:** Laurie Owen. Laurie is a Nottingham-based independent producer who works across theatre and comedy.

For more information or to register for an audition slot, please email Chris on [kitsims@gmail.com](mailto:kitsims@gmail.com)

PROFIT SHARE
# **Audition notice: Underneath the Lintel**

Show dates: 20-24 October 2026

Show venue: Nottingham Arts Theatre (studio)

Audition date: 11 July 2026, 1-4 pm (you will not need to be present for the full time and will be assigned a timeslot).

Audition venue: Lace Market Theatre, Nottingham

Karuna Productions invites auditionees for *Underneath the Lintel,* a one-woman show about obsession, loneliness and the search for belonging. When a middle-aged librarian uncovers evidence that a mythical figure dating back to mediaeval times may actually exist, she embarks on an improbable, absurd quest. It will take her across the world and face to face with life’s biggest questions – and finally to a small theatre in Nottingham to share her story…
# Parts

**The Librarian **(F, 40s-50s). Dutch (accent negotiable. Support will be available as needed on pronunciation of a few Dutch words – the director is a Dutch speaker). Eccentric, single-minded, a loner, somewhat scatty. She may initially appear ordinary, even forgettable, but a great deal lurks beneath. Requires a skilled actor with excellent comic instincts, who can command an audience’s attention while convincing as someone with limited social skills and an acute interest in minutiae.

# **About the production**

The run time of the show is about 1 hour. Rehearsals will take place in Nottingham, scheduled according to the availability of actor and director. This is a profit-share production.

# **About the company**

Karuna Productions is a new theatre company based in Nottingham.

**Director: **Chris Sims. Chris is a Nottingham-based director and graduate of the Bristol Old Vic Theatre School. Examples of his work can be found at [www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk](https://www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk/).

**Producer:** Laurie Owen. Laurie is a Nottingham-based independent producer who works across theatre and comedy.

For more information or to register for an audition slot, please email Chris on [kitsims@gmail.com](mailto:kitsims@gmail.com)

items.text:
URGENT CASTING – TikTok Shop LIVE HOST (IN-STORE) – LONDON
We are a London-based brand urgently looking for an experienced TikTok Shop Live Host to run an in-store live selling session.

📍 Location: London (in-store brand location)

📅 Date: Sunday, 14th June 2026

🕟 Time: 4:30 PM – 7:30 PM (3 hours)

💷 Rate: £50/hour

🔥 Role Overview

We are looking for a confident TikTok Shop Live Host to present and sell Home & Living products, with a selection of fashion items, during a live in-store TikTok Shop broadcast. You will represent the brand live, engage viewers, and drive real-time sales.

✅ Requirements

Minimum 1 year experience on TikTok Shop LIVE

Proven experience hosting or co-hosting TikTok Shop live streams for brands

Strong on-camera presence and sales ability

Confident presenting Home & Living + fashion products

Comfortable working in a fast-paced in-store live environment

Strong understanding of TikTok hooks, engagement, and conversion tactics

💡 Responsibilities

Host a TikTok Shop LIVE session in-store

Present and demonstrate Home & Living and Fashion products

Engage with live audience in real time

Drive sales and conversions during the stream

Follow brand direction while maintaining natural energy and delivery

⚡ Important

This is a one-day urgent casting for a scheduled live event. Reliability and prior TikTok Shop LIVE experience are essential.

📞 If you are available to go live, please call: +44 7585 586665

Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Spielfilm Großprojekt (Kinoformat) suchen wir noch Darsteller für kleinere Rollen, aber auch Komparsen, für Ritter, Dorfbewohner, Räuber, Schmied, Bauern. Ihr habt Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein, dann schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße an: harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald.

Viele Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.previewTitle:
If you're interested, email us (see bio) with your CV and headshots!

Before It’s All Over is a new original comedy drama centring on four friends who, facing a number of issues ranging from dissertation deadlines, pushy parents, identity and self-destructive behaviour, learn that a meteorite is set to hit the Earth. Deciding to go out with a figurative bang before the literal one, they decide to finish out their lives with a final party.

items.text: Casting call!!

sharedPost.text:
🌟 REGALLY ROYAL PARTIES 🌟

CASTING CALL – 
CHILDREN’S ENTERTAINERS Southport , Liverpool , Preston!! 

Do you love performing, bringing characters to life, and creating magical memories for children? We are looking for enthusiastic performers to join our growing team!

We’re looking for people who are:

✨ Confident and outgoing
✨ Reliable and professional
✨ Great with children and families
✨ Energetic and enthusiastic
✨ Strong performers (acting, singing, dancing, or character work is a bonus)
✨ Able to work weekends and school holidays
✨ Team players with a positive attitude
✨ Passionate about making children’s dreams come true

📅 AUDITION DATES
25th June
26th June

What we offer:

👑 Competitive pay
👑 Exciting performance opportunities
👑 Flexible work! You set your schedule
👑 Ongoing training and support
👑 A fun and rewarding working environment

Join the magic and become part of the Regally Royal Parties family!

📲 To apply, send us a message on WhatsApp: 07889 288335

📧 Or email us: regallyroyalparties@yahoo.com

Regally Royal Parties

Creating magical memories, one celebration at a time. ✨👑

To APPLY, USA MESSAGE ON WHATSAPP: 07889 288335 EMAIL US: regallyroyalparties@yahoo.com CREATING MAGICAL MEMORIES, ONE CELEBRATION'

items.text:
Paid casting call in Chicago searching for male actor and Child actors!
Thanks everyone! We are DePaul directing major MFA students, doing our master degree thesis short film. 

Please let me know if you are interested or know anyone! Paid. 

COMPENSATION : Paid / Stipend + Meals + Credit + Copy

SHOOT DATES: July 17-27,2026 (specific dates depend on role)

Email us: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of macrame and text

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL KNOTS SEEKING PIETRO Male, late 30s-mid 40s For a student thesis short fil Pietro is the father of Sebastian and Samuel. Tired, loving, and overwhelmed, he is trying to hold the family together on the day th leave for Italy. He is practical caring, but emotionally stretch thin. Looking for an actor with warmth, restraint, and a grounded presence. Shoot Dates: day between July 17-27 Location: Chicago area Compensation: Paid, stipend copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self-tape to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL SEEKING: SEBASTIAN For Male, student thesis short film Sebastian. Quiet, guarded, and emotionally mature in some ways, but still very much child. On the day his family is leaving for Italy, he secretly sets out to visit his mother' grave before too late. He loves deeply, but he hides everything behind silence, distance, and anger. Looking for an actor who can carry emotion through stillness, looks, and small behavior. Shoot Dates: days between July 17-27 Location: area Compensation: Paid stipend +copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com (For minors, submissions must come from parent/guardian.)'
May be an image of text

items.title: ‼️CASTING CALL - WARSAW‼️

sharedPost.text:
COMMERCIAL – EXTRAS

We are looking for people of African, Middle Eastern, or Asian descent to appear as extras in a commercial.

For a disco club scene. Background dancers on the dance floor.

Non-featured role

Application links:

🔹 Women, ages 18–35
https://casting-app.pl/apply/bd8b3f416035459e9fc5575486e7f5e4

🔹 Men, ages 18–35
https://casting-app.pl/apply/32ada6ac0d8146109f81b26b125d2a3a

📍 Shooting date: June 16
📍 Location: Warsaw
📍 Shooting schedule: Daytime

💰 Rate: PLN 300 per shooting day (paid in cash after filming)

📸 Requirements: Well-groomed appearance
📩 Please apply only through the link provided under the role description.

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '16.06 African, Asian, Middle Eastern & Latin American talent 300 PLN'

sharedPost.text:
📢 POSZUKUJEMY BRACI BIOLOGICZNYCH DO PŁATNEGO BADANIA TECHNOLOGICZNEGO 📢

Poszukujemy biologicznych braci (rodzeństwa mężczyzn), którzy:

✅ ukończyli 31 lat,
✅ mają różnicę wieku nie większą niż 5 lat.

Udział polega na stacjonarnym teście technologicznym realizowanym w Warszawie (Praga-Południe). Badanie dotyczy oceny skuteczności nowej technologii.

📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa, Praga-Południe
⏱ Czas trwania: około 120 minut
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 285 zł dla każdej osoby, płatne przelewem przez firmę realizującą badanie
📅 Termin: do ustalenia (możliwe terminy już w czerwcu)

Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać na adres:
📧 impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com

W zgłoszeniu prosimy podać:
• numer telefonu do siebie i do brata,
• imię i nazwisko swoje oraz brata,
• aktualne zdjęcie każdej osoby biorącej udział w badaniu.

W temacie wiadomości prosimy wpisać:
„Badanie”.

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń!

items.text:
**UKRYTA PRAWDA  - WARSZAWA - CZERWIEC**

1. **JACEK (38) **- wrażliwy, emocjonalny, mściwy mężczyzna. Podejmuje terapię u Tomasza tylko z chęci zemsty: obwinia terapeutę za to, że żona od niego odeszła i zabrała dziecko. 15 i 17.06 Stawka 1200 zł 
2. **PACJENT 17.06**, kilka zdań, 250 zł płatne po planie
3. **KOMISARZ 19.06**, kilka zdań, 250 zł płatne po planie

📩 Mailowo proszę przesłać informacje: imię i nazwisko, wiek, wzrost, numer telefonu oraz materiały: wideo wizytówkę, aktualne zdjęcia i informacje o doświadczeniu. 

Zgłoszenia kierujemy na: [patrycja.lewandowska@constantin-entertainment.pl](mailto:patrycja.lewandowska@constantin-entertainment.pl) w tytule wpisując nazwę roli.

items.title: **UKRYTA PRAWDA  - WARSZAWA - CZERWIEC**

items.text:
🚨 PILNE „UKRYTA PRAWDA” na 15 i 17.06 🚨

Poszukujemy mężczyzny z doświadczeniem aktorskim do roli z tekstem:

🎭 Jacek Frączek (38–50 lat)

➡️ Pacjent Tomasza. Wrażliwy, emocjonalny, ale jednocześnie skrywający w sobie dużą urazę i chęć zemsty. Podejmuje terapię wyłącznie dlatego, że obwinia terapeutę za rozpad swojego małżeństwa oraz odejście żony, która zabrała ich dziecko.🎬 Łącznie: 9 scen

⚠️ Ważne: postać nie może od początku wzbudzać podejrzeń. Szukamy osoby, która naturalnie wpisze się w rolę zwyczajnego, sympatycznego mężczyzny, pod którego pozornym spokojem kryją się silne emocje.

📅 Terminy zdjęciowe:
• 15.06
• 17.06

💰 Wynagrodzenie:
1200 zł netto za całość

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na:
casting@constantin-entertainment.pl

W treści zgłoszenia prosimy o podanie:
✔️ imienia i nazwiska
✔️ wieku
✔️ miasta zamieszkania
✔️ opisu doświadczenia aktorskiego
✔️ linku do demo (jeśli posiadasz)
✔️ numeru telefonu
✔️ aktualnych zdjęć

Dziękujemy!

items.text:
Zostały jeszcze dwie role do obsadzenia:

1. Eliza około 33 lat.
Jest to główna rola także proszę osoby z dużym doświadczeniem na planie.
Terminy zdjęć 21,22,23 czerwca.

2. Mateusz około 32 lat.
Epizodyczna rola na 21 oraz 23 czerwca. 
Odnośnie Mateusza proszę tylko osoby z Wrocławia i okolic.

Zdjęcia odbędą się we Wrocławiu.
Produkcja Trudne Sprawy. 
Wynagrodzenie za rolę jak i zwrot kosztów podróży płatne gotówką na planie. Hotel na koszt firmy. 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na emial adres 
adrian.zarzecki@polotmedia.pl z informacją wiek, jakie doświadczenie na planie, aktualne zdjęcia i numer tel.

Można też napisać komentarz pod postem.
Postaram odezwać się do każdego kandydata.

Do zobaczenia na planie ;)

items.text:
**CASTING DO SERIALU TRUDNE SPRAWY**

Jesteś młody, masz talent aktorski, charyzmę przed kamerą i marzysz o występach w profesjonalnej produkcji? Nie czekaj, to właśnie Twoja szansa. Rozpoczynam casting i szukam osób do różnych ról.
> Zaznaczam, że do głównych ról szukam tylko i wyłącznie osób z warsztatem aktorskim bądź z dużym doświadczeniem na planach **

**KOGO SZUKAM??**

**Role pierwszoplanowe:**
* Klara Rudzka (22 l.) - główna bohaterka: ***23-25.06.2026***

*(Atrakcyjna, zadbana, pełna energii i pozytywna. Jej ojciec zostawił rodzinę, matka jest właścicielką gabinetu medycyny estetycznej. Klara studiuje architekturę)****.***
* Michał Liszka (24 l.) - chłopak Klary: ***23-25.06.2026***

*(Przystojny, szarmancki. Studiuje architekturę, pochodzi z niezamożnej rodziny, ale studia to było jego marzenie i sam na nie pracuje. Zakochany w Klarze, chce jej zaimponować, dlatego dał się namówić koledze na występowanie jako chippendale).*

**Epizodyści:**
* Jacek Malik (25 l.) - syn wspólniczki Marty: ***23-25.06.2026**** (Przystojny. Trochę śliski. Typ imprezowicza.)*
* Jagoda Malik (45 l.) - wspólniczka Marty: ***24.06.2026 ****(Zadbana, obrotna bizneswoman)*

items.summary:
**CASTING DO SERIALU TRUDNE SPRAWY**

Jesteś młody, masz talent aktorski, charyzmę przed kamerą i marzysz o występach w profesjonalnej produkcji? Nie czekaj, to właśnie Twoja szansa. Rozpoczynam casting i szukam osób do różnych ról.
> Zaznaczam, że do głównych ról szukam tylko i wyłącznie osób z warsztatem aktorskim bądź z dużym doświadczeniem na planach **

**KOGO SZUKAM??**

**Role pierwszoplanowe:**
* Klara Rudzka (22 l.) - główna bohaterka: ***23-25.06.2026***

*(Atrakcyjna, zadbana, pełna energii i pozytywna. Jej ojciec zostawił rodzinę, matka jest właścicielką gabinetu medycyny estetycznej. Klara studiuje architekturę)****.***
* Michał Liszka (24 l.) - chłopak Klary: ***23-25.06.2026***

*(Przystojny, szarmancki. Studiuje architekturę, pochodzi z niezamożnej rodziny, ale studia to było jego marzenie i sam na nie pracuje. Zakochany w Klarze, chce jej zaimponować, dlatego dał się namówić koledze na występowanie jako chippendale).*

**Epizodyści:**
* Jacek Malik (25 l.) - syn wspólniczki Marty: ***23-25.06.2026**** (Przystojny. Trochę śliski. Typ imprezowicza.)*
* Jagoda Malik (45 l.) - wspólniczka Marty: ***24.06.2026 ****(Zadbana, obrotna bizneswoman)*
* Miłosz (23 l.) - współlokator Michała: ***25.06.2026***

** Mniejsze epizody, statyści z tekstem:

**Taksówkarz - *****23.06 i 25.06.2026 (2 sceny)***

**Ochroniarz - *****25.06.2026 (1 scena)***

Jeżeli uważasz, że pasujesz do którejś z wyżej wymienionych postaci, pasuje ci podany termin i chciałbyś/chciałabyś wystąpić w telewizji - *,,napisz do mnie w prywatnej wiadomości lub zadzwoń pod numer ****tel. 798 970 883''***

Commercial Casting (Finance Ad)!

Paid! Filming in Denver, June 15th

Looking for:

1 Male (45-65yo) + 1 Female (45-65yo) to play a married couple.

1 Male (25-35yo) + 1 Female (25-35yo) to play newlyweds.

1 Male (45-65yo) to play a construction worker.

1 Male (35-50yo) to play a bank teller.

Please email kodocasting@gmail.com with your headshot, resume, and reel if interested. Thank you!

items.text:
☠️ Listen up, ya landlubbers...

We're buildin' a cast. We're buildin' a crew. And we're buildin' a movie.

If you've ever wanted to act, run camera, make content, tell stories, or just be part of somethin' bigger than yourself...

Now's the time to climb aboard.

🎬 Tomorrow • 6:30 PM
📍 Colorado Media School

4380 S Syracuse St Suite 400, Denver, CO 80237

No fancy Hollywood nonsense.

Just good people makin' movies.

🌐 https://movieteam.site/

The tide waits for no pirate.

topComments.text: To say I'm excited would be an understatement. Opportunities like this are the reason I get out of bed in the morning. I love bringing ideas to life, solving creative problems, and helping people tell their stories. I'm energized by the possibility of contributing and can't wait to see where this adventure leads. Follow https://www.instagram.com/dirtypirateproductions/
Hi Hollie. Since we just found out about this is there another day or time for auditions besides tomorrow night? Morning? Or later this week?

items.text:
CASTING CALL: JESSICA — Supernatural Horror Feature Film

Non-Union
Rate: $200/day
Shooting location: Winnipeg, MB
Shoot dates: July 2026

Roles:
Susie — Lead · Female · 27–33
Jacob — Lead · Male · must read as 7
Jessica — Lead · Female · must read as 7
Olivia — Supporting · Female · must read as 7
Ken — Supporting · Male · late 50s–mid 60s — CAST
David — Supporting · Male · mid-30s — CAST

The roles of Ken and David have been cast. Please do not apply for those roles.

Role Commitments:
Susie — 12 shoot days
Jacob — 12 shoot days
Jessica — 8 shoot days
Olivia — 2 shoot days

Submission deadline: June 17, 2026

Submit a recent headshot, resume, and reel if available.

Apply here:
jessicahorrorfilm.com

Please do not send Facebook messages. Use the contact information on the website.

items.previewDescription: 12.06.2026 - Herbert Krautwurm ist ein bekannter, zertifizierter Kellergassenführer und ein echtes „Original“ aus dem niederösterreichischen Pulkautal. Er engagiert sich leidenschaftlich für die Erhaltung, Renovierung und Belebung der traditionellen...

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören 

Herbert Krautwurm ist ein bekannter, zertifizierter Kellergassenführer und ein echtes „Original“ aus dem niederösterreichischen Pulkautal. Er engagiert sich leidenschaftlich für die Erhaltung, Renovierung und Belebung der traditionellen Weinkultur im Weinviertel. Wofür er bekannt ist, darüber sprach Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs mit diesem Unikat.

Looking for Actors 🎬

I’m looking for people to collaborate on UGC (User Generated Content) videos, simple phone recordings done at home.

📍 Requirements:

• age: 25 to 65 

• comfortable in front of the camera

• very short videos (around 1 minute)

💰 Paid collaboration – £60 per video

🎯 Topic: promotion of a health & wellness product

If you’re interested, please send us (BreatheLio) a message with a short introduction and (if available) your portfolio or comment below.

items.title: Looking for Actors 🎬

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL - EDINBURGH ‼️‼️
Hello, we are currently looking for a male actor for our student short film with Edinburgh College. We are aiming for film from the 6-9th of May and so are looking for someone who will be available within those days. 

Age - 25-26 ( Casting age - 25-27 or just an older looking 23 and above year olds.)
Identity - Straight, white, man, Scottish.
Personality - Narcissist, passionate, hot headed,
"nice" guy, controlling, and abusive.
Character Synopsis - Dany is dating a girl who discovers that her blood glows. He then discovers that he is obsessed with looking at the blood, and continues to ask his girlfriend (Bevan) to give him more of her blood. Disappointed when she can no longer produce what he wants, he leaves her.

Story Synopsis: A young girl discovers that her blood glows while harming herself. Panicked and disturbed by this discovery, she shows her boyfriend. Who, instead of having care or concern for her, starts exploiting her for her blood as he is enticed by it.
Struggling to perform and produce consistently for him, she grapples with self hate and worth, loosing grip on her mental state. Eventually, when her blood isn’t satisfactory for him anymore, he leaves her feeling worthless after sucking her dry of her youth and innocence.

If you are interested or want to know more please email our director at: ec1958677@edinburghcollege.ac.uk

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text

items.text:
**CASTING CALL –** ***OMG Stories ***

Hi, my name is Mireille and I’m a Casting Agent at Upstream Media leading the search for contributors for the ongoing series ***OMG Stories: Up Close.*** We are looking for individuals with extraordinary lived experiences who would be interested in sharing their story in their own words.

**Details:**

📍 Location: Central London
📅 Shoot dates: Ongoing
💷 Paid opportunity (£££)

**Requirements:**
• All ages welcome
• All genders welcome
• Must be based in the UK or willing to travel

**If you’re interested, please send:**
• A brief summary of your story
• A video link or self-tape

📧 Email: [mireille.lee@upstream-media.co.uk](mailto:mireille.lee@upstream-media.co.uk)

topComments.text: How much does it pay please?

items.text:
🎙️ A Message from Aileen Mythen about our upcoming ONLINE Voiceover Class...
We are absolutely thrilled to announce that the incredible Aileen Mythen will be joining our Introduction to Professional Voiceover Online Class this July. @aileenmythen

If you've ever dreamed of working in animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is an opportunity to learn from one of Ireland's most accomplished voice performers.

With more than 20 years of professional experience, Aileen has built an extraordinary career across voiceover, television, theatre and singing. Her animation credits include work with Disney, Warner Bros. and Brown Bag Films, while her gaming performances feature titles such as Genshin Impact, Arknights, Marvel Cosmic Invasion, The Talos Principle 2 and many more.

Her voice has also been trusted by major brands including Lidl, Mercedes, Barry's Tea, Centra, Zurich Insurance and Irish Ferries, alongside a huge range of commercial campaigns.

Most recently, Aileen completed narration on the new audiobook Our Deadly Summer, written by Emer McLysaght and Sarah Breen and published by Bloomsbury.

This special online session takes place on July 31st and is designed to give aspiring voice actors a genuine insight into the professional industry from someone who lives and breathes it every day.

Whether your passion is animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is a class you won't want to miss.

🎙️ Book your place now: (Link in bio also) https://pbl-dmd-events.indiestand.com/products/online-introduction-to-voiceover-class-with-pbl-voiceover-coach

#VoiceOver #VoiceActing #Animation #Gaming #IrishVoiceActor Audiobooks PBLVoiceover VoiceoverTraining Acting Performance GenshinImpact GameVoiceActor

items.summary:
🎙️ A Message from Aileen Mythen about our upcoming ONLINE Voiceover Class...
We are absolutely thrilled to announce that the incredible Aileen Mythen will be joining our Introduction to Professional Voiceover Online Class this July. @aileenmythen

If you've ever dreamed of working in animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is an opportunity to learn from one of Ireland's most accomplished voice performers.

With more than 20 years of professional experience, Aileen has built an extraordinary career across voiceover, television, theatre and singing. Her animation credits include work with Disney, Warner Bros. and Brown Bag Films, while her gaming performances feature titles such as Genshin Impact, Arknights, Marvel Cosmic Invasion, The Talos Principle 2 and many more.

Her voice has also been trusted by major brands including Lidl, Mercedes, Barry's Tea, Centra, Zurich Insurance and Irish Ferries, alongside a huge range of commercial campaigns.

Most recently, Aileen completed narration on the new audiobook Our Deadly Summer, written by Emer McLysaght and Sarah Breen and published by Bloomsbury.

This special online session takes place on July 31st and is designed to give aspiring voice actors a genuine insight into the professional industry from someone who lives and breathes it every day.

Whether your passion is animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is a class you won't want to miss.

🎙️ Book your place now: (Link in bio also) https://pbl-dmd-events.indiestand.com/products/online-introduction-to-voiceover-class-with-pbl-voiceover-coach

#VoiceOver #VoiceActing #Animation #Gaming #IrishVoiceActor Audiobooks PBLVoiceover VoiceoverTraining Acting Performance GenshinImpact GameVoiceActor

items.text:
Das neue Streaming Bundle für Unter uns Fans #unteruns #hbomax #rtl+ #rtlplus 

https://youtube.com/shorts/sRtW50ssRrA 

Mein Moment im Büroloft von „Unter uns“

Diese Woche durfte ich bei „Unter uns“ in den @mmcstudios Köln als Nebenrollendarsteller mit Text vor der Kamera stehen. Die Szene spielte im Büroloft zwischen Huber & Huber Bauvision und Goldberg Superior Cologne. Mehr darf ich nicht verraten.

@actpm Patrick Müller als Tobias Lassner

Patrick verkörpert seit 2006 Tobias Lassner, einen erfolgreichen Anwalt mit kühler Fassade und weichem Kern. Seine Verbindung zu Leo macht diese Figur besonders menschlich und erzählerisch stark im Ensemble.

@miriam_lahnstein Miriam Lahnstein als Patrizia Neumann-Goldberg

Miriam spielt Patrizia Neumann-Goldberg, eine selbstbewusste Unternehmerin mit Machtinstinkt, Charme und Konsequenz. Als Mutter von Stella verkörpert sie Kontrolle, Ehrgeiz und familiäre Spannung mit großer Präsenz vor der Kamera.

@harun.yildirim_official Harun Yildirim als Ferhat Gülek

Harun spielt Ferhat Gülek, Architekt, Vater von Baris und Esma sowie Noch-Ehemann von Dana. Seine Figur bringt Charme, Lebensfreude und emotionale Bewegung in die Serie und in die Schillerallee hinein.

Wertschätzung am Set

Besonders wertvoll war das ruhige, respektvolle Miteinander der UFA-Produktion. In den MMC Studios Köln spürt man Präzision, Vertrauen, Timing und Teamgeist hinter jeder Szene und jedem gemeinsamen Moment am Set.

Jetzt ansehen und dranbleiben

Wenn Ihr „Unter uns“ verfolgt, achtet gern auf diese Figuren. Die Serie läuft jeden Abend bei @rtl_de und ist auf @rtlplus streambar. Teil 2 findet Ihr im Kanal von @sandras.social.media.creation (Sandra Wötzel) zum Weiterlesen.

Christian Weiße aka @christian_weisse_digi_content

#UnterUns #RTL #RTLPlus #UFASerialDrama #MMCStudios

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – LEAD ACTOR WANTED

We're currently casting for our upcoming short film:

NO SERVICE

A dramatic, character-driven short film created for an upcoming 72-Hour Film Festival in Vancouver.

We're looking for:

🎭 CHRIS (Lead Role)

Male | Age 28–40

Strong emotional range required.

This is a performance-heavy role and the emotional centerpiece of the film. Ideal for actors looking to expand their reel with a challenging dramatic character.

We are also casting:

🎭 HOMELESS MAN (Supporting Role)

Male | Age Open

📍 Vancouver Area

🎬 Festival Project

🍕 Meals Provided

🎞 IMDb Credit

🏆 Festival Submission

If interested, please send:

• Headshot

• Resume (if available)

• Demo Reel (if available)

📧 [maaaxieee@gmail.com](mailto:maaaxieee@gmail.com)

Selected applicants may be invited to submit a short self-tape audition.

🎬 CASTING CALL – LEAD ACTOR WANTED

We're currently casting for our upcoming short film:

NO SERVICE

A dramatic, character-driven short film created for an upcoming 72-Hour Film Festival in Vancouver.

We're looking for:

🎭 CHRIS (Lead Role)

Male | Age 28–40

Strong emotional range required.

This is a performance-heavy role and the emotional centerpiece of the film. Ideal for actors looking to expand their reel with a challenging dramatic character.

We are also casting:

🎭 HOMELESS MAN (Supporting Role)

Male | Age Open

📍 Vancouver Area

🎬 Festival Project

🍕 Meals Provided

🎞 IMDb Credit

🏆 Festival Submission

If interested, please send:

• Headshot

• Resume (if available)

• Demo Reel (if available)

📧 [maaaxieee@gmail.com](mailto:maaaxieee@gmail.com)

Selected applicants may be invited to submit a short self-tape audition.

Please share with anyone who may be interested.

topComments.text:
Hi the location of an agency is irrelevant so don't limit yourself... Apply to agencies which have both adult and child divisions as you will start as a Young Performer and get Spotlight automatically but will transition soon to adults... Your parent needs to apply for you as you are under 18... If they join Children's Acting, Modelling, Casting Calls & FREE Advice for Parents UK that has lots of advice and a list of reputable agencies in featured posts
.. you may wish to look at Aston Management 
And Brill and Rebecca Middleton for starters... Good luck!
Do take a look at this https://www.reddit.com/r/ActingUK/comments/1tjwwee/mark_jermin_under_fire_for_fake_castings_false/

items.text:
✨ CASTING CALL – A PLACE NOT MINE ✨

💫 *"There must be a place where my heart isn't a burden."*

🎭 We are excited to announce casting for **A Place Not Mine**, an original fantasy musical about belonging, love, loss, and the things in life we cannot always avoid.

📍 Rehearsals: Middlesex University, London
🎟️ Performances: The Drayton Arms Theatre
📅 29 & 30 November 2026

💛 This is an independent, unpaid production. Should funding become available, any profits will be shared among the cast and creative team.

🌟 We are currently seeking performers aged **18–30** *(35 for Sylas)*, as well as members of our creative team.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎭 AVAILABLE ROLES

🖤 **RIVEN**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Riven (Winx Club)
🧠 Intelligent, withdrawn and emotionally guarded.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 *Reflection* – Mulan

💖 **SERAPHINE**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Glinda (Wicked)
✨ Bright, bubbly and seemingly perfect.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 *Once Upon a December* – Anastasia

☀️ **ORIS**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Olaf (Frozen)
😊 Loyal, optimistic and unintentionally funny.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 *This Wish* – Wish

🖤 **SYLAS**
🎂 Playing age: 25–35
📖 Character reference: Severus Snape (Harry Potter)
📚 Strict, intelligent and intimidating.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 *This Is The Thanks I Get?!* – Wish

🌲 **ROWAN**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Kristoff (Frozen)
😏 A sarcastic drama king who uses humour to survive awkward situations.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 Any Disney song

⚡ **ELARA**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Jade West (Victorious)
🗣️ Sharp, intelligent and never afraid to speak her mind.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 Any Disney song

🤍 **AURORA**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Mitchie Torres (Camp Rock)
🌷 Kind-hearted, supportive and emotionally open.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 Any Disney song

🌙 **SELENE**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Barbie (Barbie 2023)
💞 Sweet, energetic and slightly chaotic.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 Any Disney song

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎬 CREATIVE TEAM OPPORTUNITIES

We are also looking for:

🎭 DIRECTOR
✅ CHOREOGRAPHER – TAKEN
🎼 MUSICAL DIRECTOR

🎓 These positions are ideal for university students looking to expand their portfolio, gain practical experience, or complete placement requirements.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📩 HOW TO APPLY

Send us a DM on our Instagram page:

📱 @a.place.not.mine

🎥 Actors should submit a self-tape performing the requested audition song.

🌟 Successful applicants will receive an invitation to an in-person audition.

💫 We look forward to hearing from you.

🏡 *Find a place that's yours.*

PERFORMANCES 29&30 NOVEMBER 2026 THE DRAY THEDRAYTON TON ARMSTHEATRE THEATRE ARMS CASTING CALL AGED AGED18-3 18- 30 NOFORMALTRAINING NOFORMAL TRAINING REQUIRED IRED SUBMITASELF-TAPE UBMIT ASELF-TAPE (REQUESTED ESTED SONG) (REQU DM DMUSTOAPPLY APPLY @A.PLACE.NOT.MINE @A.PLACE EACH UCCESSFUI APPLICANT WILL RECEIVE MESSAGE WITH AN INVITATION TO AN -PERSON AUDITION. +FINDAPLACET HAT''

items.text:
Undskyld konditor, din hemmelighed : Jeg kan ikke stoppe med at bage sandwichbrød! Ingen æltning, ingen æg, intet smør! Så bløde og lækre, at mine kolleger bliver ved med at bede mig om at piske dem op! 
Dette enkle sandwichbrød er let, luftigt og perfekt til ethvert måltid. Med blot et par enkle ingredienser får du frisk, hjemmelavet brød uden besværet!
Opskrift i kommentarerne. 

FOR AT FORTSÆTTE MED MINE OPSKRIFTER, "DEL"

Hello everybody, my name is Jahmai Davis. I’m deaf actor. American Sign Language is my first language.

items.text:
TV CASTING! 

Would you and your household like to tackle an array of creative and head-scratching tasks at home in the hope of winning a cash prize?  The makers of Taskmaster are looking for households across the UK to take part. 

More information and application form here: [www.avalontvcasting.com](http://www.avalontvcasting.com/)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'পিক THE MAKERS OF TASKMASTER ARE CASTING NOW FOR A NEW CHANNEL SHOW! your household enjoy watching Taskmaster and would you love the chance the tasks? you could compete together against other households from the comfort your own home AND with chance of winning cash prize? Avalon Television looking for fun and quick-thinking families/housemates/couples to tackle creative and tasks Alex Horne of Taskmaster fame host information and application form link below We only www.avalontvcasting.co Terms and conditions apply. applications from household member aged 18+ Closing date 23:59 on Friday 26th June 2026. information you provide application privacy policy:'

items.text:
This summer, the spotlight returns brighter than ever as Talent Search UK celebrates 17 YEARS of discovering the undiscovered! 🇬🇧✨

Join our incredible judging panel LIVE on TikTok including BRITAINS GOT TALENT Kathleen Jenkins , The Voice UKS Kelly Hastings & Vocal Coach & Producer Joei Blake as we search for the UK’s next rising stars in singing, entertainment, and performance! 🌟

🔥 LIVE SERIES DATES:
📅 Every Monday from July 6th – August 24th
📍 LIVE on TikTok

🏆 WHAT’S UP FOR GRABS?
✨ The UK Title & Trophy
🎥 Music Video & Recording Opportunities
📱 Huge Social Media Promotion
🌍 Exposure Across the UK

Whether you sing, dance, entertain, perform magic, or have a unique talent — THIS is your moment to shine. ⭐

🎟 Applications NOW OPEN
🌐 www.TalentSearchUK.com

#TalentSearchUK #TikTokLive #UKTalent #Singers #Performers #TalentCompetition #TheVoiceUK #BritainsGotTalent #MusicArtists #UnsignedArtists #TalentShow #LiveShow #DiscoverTalent #UKMusic #ApplyNow

TOMORROW! First class FREE!!!

DM to book in. 🙌

sharedPost.text:
Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

items.text:
CREATIVE SUPPORT CIRCLE

A Psychology & Personal Growth Workshop for Artists, Performers and Creatives

Being creative can be exciting, meaningful and deeply fulfilling.

It can also be isolating.

Many artists, performers, freelancers and creative professionals experience self-doubt, burnout, creative blocks, performance anxiety, uncertainty and the pressure of constantly creating while trying to build a sustainable life.

Creative Support Circle is a supportive space where creatives can explore these challenges together in a respectful and confidential environment.

This introductory workshop is designed for people who create, perform, teach, write, build projects or simply want to reconnect with their creativity and personal growth.

Through guided discussion, reflection and practical psychological tools, participants will have the opportunity to better understand themselves, connect with others facing similar challenges and develop healthier ways of navigating the creative journey.

WHAT TO EXPECT

• Guided discussions and reflection

• Practical psychological insights and tools

• Conversations about creativity, motivation and well-being

• A supportive and respectful group environment

• Connection with fellow artists, performers and creatives

• An opportunity to help shape future workshops based on the group's needs

FACILITATED BY

Begüm Karausta, MA Clinical Psychologist

Begüm Karausta is a Clinical Psychologist based in Warsaw with experience supporting both international and Polish clients.

Alongside her private practice, she works with employees of major organizations across Poland, helping people navigate life transitions, workplace challenges, relationships, emotional well-being and personal development.

Her approach combines professional psychological knowledge with practical tools that participants can apply in everyday life.

WHO IS THIS FOR?

• Artists

• Comedians

• Actors

• Musicians

• Writers

• Facilitators

• Creative entrepreneurs

• Freelancers

• Performers

• Anyone seeking personal growth while pursuing a creative path

WORKSHOP DETAILS

📅 Monday, July 6

🕔 17:00 – 19:00

📍 Praga Południe, Warsaw

(Exact address shared after registration)

LIMITED TO 10 PARTICIPANTS

To ensure a meaningful and high-quality experience, this workshop is intentionally limited to 10 participants only.

The small-group format allows everyone to actively participate, be heard and benefit from deeper discussion and interaction

IMPORTANT

This workshop is intended for education, personal growth and community support.

It is not psychotherapy, psychological treatment or a healthcare service.

A space to reflect.

A space to connect.

A space to grow.

@impactwarsaw

impactwarsaw.com

Inner Circle Telegram:

https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk

Gibt es jemanden, der aus Nähe Düsseldorf kommt und sich vorstellen könnte auch etwas mit Kindern zusammen zu machen? 
Wir schreiben unsere eigenen Lieder und brauchen jemanden, der dafür Beats produzieren könnte und auch die Möglichkeit hat zum Recorden.

Wenn dem so ist; einfach anschreiben, auch wenn die Nachricht im Spam landet, wir antworten auf jeden Fall. ￼

Danke im Voraus 🐥👑

items.text:
TRÓJMIASTO / WSPÓŁPRACA] MUA / Charakteryzatorka do 7-minutowego filmu  (Thriller psychologiczny)
Cześć! Równolegle z przygotowaniami do mojego większego projektu, w ramach „rozgrzewki reżyserskiej” i testów plastycznych, realizuję wraz z mężem kameralną, 7-minutową etiudę na YouTube. Będzie to intensywne, klimatyczne studium postaci w konwencji thrillera psychologicznego.
Traktuję ten film jako poligon doświadczalny dla konkretnych ustawień światła (kontrasty pomarańcz/niebieski) i budowania skrajnych emocji, dlatego szukam utalentowanej MUA / Charakteryzatorki z Trójmiasta do stałej współpracy przy tym i kolejnych projektach.
Termin: Całkowicie elastyczny i do indywidualnego dogadania.
Czas trwania: Zdjęcia planujemy rozłożyć na około 5 dni zdjęciowych (będą to raczej krótsze, kameralne spotkania dopasowane do naszych grafików).
Wyzwanie artystyczne:
Szukam osoby, która pomoże mi stworzyć trzy skrajne, filmowe stany emocjonalne głównej bohaterki (brunetki) poprzez charakteryzację i włosy. Dokładną estetykę i kierunek wizualny przedstawiam na załączonych do posta inspo z Pinteresta. Podstawowego zmatowienia skóry przed kamerą będzie wymagał również aktor drugoplanowy.
Co oferuję w zamian:
Projekt jest niezależny (forma TFP), szukam osób chcących rozbudować swoje portfolio o unikalne, bardzo kinowe kadry. W zamian gwarantuję:
Zamówię pyszną np. pizzę, posiłek i kawę na planie
Pełne podpisanie i oznaczenie autorstwa charakteryzacji w napisach końcowych i postach.
Piękne, gotowe materiały wideo do portfolio.
Pracę w super przyjaznej, twórczej i bezstresowej atmosferze.
Jeśli czujesz ten mroczny, plastyczny klimat i chcesz dołączyć do mojej bazy twórców, podeślij swoje portfolio lub link do Instagrama w wiadomości prywatnej!

items.text:
✨🌟 ZAPRASZAMY DO UDZIAŁU W II MIĘDZYNARODOWYM KONKURSIE SZTUKI „OD MARZENIA DO SUKCESU”! 🌟✨

🎭🎶🎨 Każdy wielki sukces zaczyna się od marzenia. To właśnie marzenia inspirują nas do działania, rozwijania talentów i osiągania nowych celów. Konkurs „Od Marzenia do Sukcesu” powstał po to, aby wspierać osoby, które z pasją realizują swoje artystyczne aspiracje i odważnie podążają drogą twórczego rozwoju.

📅 Termin przyjmowania zgłoszeń: od 12.06 do 26.06.2026 r.

🔴Unikalny koszt uczestnictwa: 20 pln🔴

💻 Konkurs odbywa się w formie zdalnej, dzięki czemu uczestnicy mogą wziąć udział z każdego miejsca w Polsce i za granicą.

🏆 W programie konkursu:

⭐ Bez ograniczeń wiekowych;
🎭 Wszystkie nominacje i gatunki artystyczne;
📜 Dyplomy i listy podziękowania;
🥇 Medale i puchary;
🌍 Międzynarodowy charakter wydarzenia;
✨ Możliwość zaprezentowania swojego talentu szerokiemu gronu odbiorców!

💫 Nazwa „Od Marzenia do Sukcesu” przypomina, że każda artystyczna droga zaczyna się od marzeń. Nie bój się pokazać swojej twórczości światu – być może właśnie ten konkurs będzie kolejnym ważnym krokiem na Twojej drodze do sukcesu!

🌟 Pokaż swój talent, zdobądź nowe doświadczenia i dołącz do grona wyjątkowych uczestników międzynarodowego wydarzenia artystycznego!

📍 Szczegółowe informacje:
🌐 2GAGENCJA.COM

🏆 „Od Marzenia do Sukcesu” – bo każdy sukces zaczyna się od marzenia! ✨🌟🎨🎶💃🕺

Do nowego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach wciąż szukam PANÓW:

- Mechanik (27) – typ drobnego kryminalisty. 2 sceny 
Data: 25.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

- Strażnik, Lech Wasiecki (47) – strażnik więzienny, w cywilu. Prosty człowiek. 2 sceny 
Data: 24.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

- Włamywacz (43) – profesjonalny złodziej, wygląd kryminalisty. 3 sceny
Data: 25.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto

- Grzesiak (51) – zresocjalizowany włamywacz. 1 scena 
Data: 26.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto

- Gangus 2, Jacek Romańczyk (30) – napakowany zbir 
  Data: 24.06 i 25.06
Stawka: 600 zł netto 

- Gangus 1, Michał Bocian (40) – kryminalista, sprawny fizycznie Data: 24.06
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.
